pages.text: $(italic)Dynamic Trees$() adds a parallel item to every vanilla sapling: the $(bold)Seed$(). Seeds grow into real living trees, animated branch-by-branch over many days. Vanilla saplings still place and grow as before.$(br2)Conversion between the two systems is one shapeless crafting recipe.
pages.title: Trees & Catalysts

pages.text: $(bold)Crafting schema$() (works both directions):$(br2)$(italic)Seed$()  +  $(italic)Catalyst$()  →  $(italic)Sapling$()$(br)$(italic)Sapling$()  +  $(italic)Catalyst$()  →  $(italic)Seed$()$(br2)Place both items anywhere in a crafting grid. No shape, no special bench.
pages.title: Crafting Schema

pages.text: $(bold)Catalyst by tree type:$()$(br)$(li)$(bold)Dirt$() — vanilla overworld trees, Quark blossoms, Tinkers' slime trees (greenheart, enderbark, skyroot)$(li)$(bold)Netherrack$() — Crimson + Warped fungi, Tinkers' Bloodshroom$(li)$(bold)Mycelium$() — DT+ brown / red mushroom trees$(li)$(bold)Red Sand / Sand / Gravel$() — DT+ cacti (Saguaro / Pillar / Pipe; one-way only — cactus → seed)
pages.title: Catalyst List

pages.text: $(bold)Three shortcuts without a catalyst:$()$(br2)$(li)$(bold)1 Apple → Apple-Oak Seed.$() Then Apple-Oak Seed + Dirt → Oak Sapling.$(li)$(bold)3 Cocoa Beans → Cocoa Seed$() ("Cocoa Pod"). Then Cocoa Seed + Dirt → Jungle Sapling.$(li)$(bold)1 Ancient Fruit → Ancient (Ashen) Seed.$() Reverse and dirt-conversion as in the table.
pages.title: Fruit Shortcuts

pages.text: $(bold)Felling a living tree:$() A dynamic tree falls in one motion. Cut the lowest branch and the entire trunk and canopy collapse together. Any axe works; a Tinkers' axe with the right modifiers does it fast.
pages.title: Felling
